title: terrellia virginica var. submutica
intro: Terrellia virginica var. submutica, also known as the woodland sunflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, while its herbal preparations include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from the plant's roots and leaves. In traditional medicine, Terrellia virginica var. submutica is used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
